summary: Bump harness defaultRuns from 3 to 5 iterations per scenario×condition pair
context: At 3 iterations with full 7×8 matrix: n=21/condition, MDES=d≥0.80, power=69% at d=0.8. At 5 iterations: n=35/condition, MDES=d≥0.62, power=90% at d=0.8. Cost increase from ~$282 to ~$470 (66%) for a full run.
rationale: The 5-iteration default is the sweet spot: realistic cost increase, meaningful power improvement (medium-effect detection at 90%), diminishing returns beyond 5. Observed real effects (d=0.4-0.8) fall in the medium range, making this the right calibration point.

alternatives.option: Keep default at 3, document 5 as recommendation
alternatives.reason_rejected: Users will run with defaults. At 3 iterations, most real effects are below MDES and the analysis produces mostly inconclusive results — wasting the $282 spent on the run.
